response.justification: The role requires 8 years of C++ as a hard minimum, plus 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems and production cloud architecture experience. The candidate's C++ exposure is limited to a 7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, with no evidence of recent C++ work or cloud compute platform engineering. Strengths in TypeScript/Node, DLang, and full-stack craftsmanship don't map to this C++-centric platform leadership role.
strengths: Long tenure with strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Demonstrated mentoring and teaching through workshops, talks, and courses
Founder-level ownership of an open-source distributed GIS platform on Kubernetes
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum
No demonstrated experience designing or operating an internal cloud compute platform
Career focus is web/full-stack and DLang rather than large-scale C++ distributed systems

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale infra background
Mentoring and technical leadership track record
